Caucasian Persimmon, Date-Plum Persimmon, Lilac Persimmon, Diospyros Lotus.
Very small but delicious and juicy. Single tree right next to a large pine Access: Public.
These trees belong to the library as part of an effort to support local pollinators. It wouldn’t hurt to walk into the library and ask before harvesting. Access: Public.
